descriptionZh: 一个纯粹基于 Python 的开源项目击败了 OpenAI 用 Rust 编写的王牌！
descriptionEn: A purely Python-based open-source project has beaten OpenAI’s Rust-written ace! The final score was 6 to 5, with Hermes showcasing raw engineering aesthetics—interpreted languages have finally turned the tables.

title: 如果人工智能抢走了我们的工作，谁来纳税？
description: 对人工智能征税并不是对技术进步的简单干预，而是旨在修复税基结构、维持财政可持续性、确保社会公平的制度反应。
titleZh: 如果人工智能抢走了我们的工作，谁来纳税？
titleEn: If AI takes our jobs, who will pay taxes?
descriptionZh: 对人工智能征税并不是对技术进步的简单干预，而是旨在修复税基结构、维持财政可持续性、确保社会公平的制度反应。
descriptionEn: Taxing AI is not a simple intervention in technological progress, but an institutional response aimed at repairing the tax base structure, maintaining fiscal sustainability, and ensuring social equity.

title: 一周完成一个月的工作：英伟达世界模型训练速度飙升400%
description: Nvidia 的世界行动模型 DreamZero 需要在单次训练中燃烧 8 个 H100 整整 25 天。
titleZh: 一周完成一个月的工作：英伟达世界模型训练速度飙升400%
titleEn: A Month's Work Done in a Week: Nvidia's World Model Training Speed Soars by 400%
descriptionZh: Nvidia 的世界行动模型 DreamZero 需要在单次训练中燃烧 8 个 H100 整整 25 天。
descriptionEn: Nvidia's world action model DreamZero requires burning 8 H100s for a full 25 days for a single training run. RLinf achieves a system-level overhaul from operator fusion to I/O across the entire pipeline, boosting training throughput by nearly 4 times—a month's work can be done in a week.
